= index_of

Returns the index of the first occurrence of a substring

== Parameters

[cols="1,1,3"]
|===
| Name | Type | Description

| `value`
| `string`
| A string to search for.

|===


== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.index = this.thing.index_of("bar")

# In:  {"thing":"foobar"}
# Out: {"index":3}
----

[,bloblang]
----
root.index = content().index_of("meow")

# In:  the cat meowed, the dog woofed
# Out: {"index":8}
----
